container.comment: Vertical thrust (one analog axis: e.g., throttle mini-stick Y or a lever)

description.description: Vertical thrust (one analog axis: e.g., throttle mini-stick Y or a lever)

container.comment: Lateral thrust (one analog axis: e.g., throttle mini-stick X)

description.description: Lateral thrust (one analog axis: e.g., throttle mini-stick X)

container.comment: “extra analog 1” (examples: zoom, sensor zoom, FSS tune)

description.description: “extra analog 1” (examples: zoom, sensor zoom, FSS tune)

container.comment: “extra analog 2” (examples: SRV throttle/steer alternative, camera zoom)

description.description: “extra analog 2” (examples: SRV throttle/steer alternative, camera zoom)

plugin.file-name: S:/Elite Dangerous Joystick Stuff/Remi's Elite Dangerous Stuff/elite_status_state_sync_gex.py

state.description: This state is a mirror of Status.json. Actions do NOT update the state
